Professional Stretch Fabric Backdrop Banners for Indoor Event Use

Create professional trade show displays with our custom backdrop replacement banners. These large format banners work seamlessly with the Slider frame system, providing an adjustable display solution from 81" to 120" width and 41.5" to 96" height. Perfect for trade shows, corporate events, and professional presentations.

Our backdrop banners feature premium 9 oz. stretch fabric material with dye-sublimation printing for vibrant, professional graphics. The telescopic frame system allows multiple graphic sizes on the same display, making it ideal for businesses that exhibit at various venues.

Backdrop Banner Package Includes:

  • (1) Single Sided Custom Graphic
  • (2) 4.5" Pole Pockets (Top and Bottom)
  • (1) Large Slider Frame
  • (1) Black Nylon Carry Bag

Professional Display Features:

  • Display Size: 96"W x 96"H
  • Graphic Size: 96"W x 94"H
  • Material: 9 oz. Stretch Fabric with Dye-Sublimation
  • Frame Color: Professional Black Finish
  • Weight: 16 lbs (portable for trade shows)
  • Shipping Size: 41" x 5" x 4" (compact storage)
  • Warranty: 1 Year on Graphic and Frame
PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Backdrop Banner Material for Trade Show Displays

Our backdrop banners are printed on premium 9 oz. stretch fabric material specifically designed for professional indoor displays. This material provides excellent graphics reproduction with vibrant colors and sharp detail through dye-sublimation printing.

Stretch Fabric Benefits:

  • Professional Appearance: Smooth, wrinkle-resistant surface for trade shows
  • Dye-Sublimation Printing: Vibrant colors that won't fade or crack
  • Lightweight Design: Easy transport between events and venues
  • Flexible Installation: Accommodates multiple frame sizes
  • Indoor Durability: Designed for repeated setup and breakdown

Frame Construction:

The Slider frame features 1.5" telescopic poles with a professional black finish. The adjustable design allows the same banner to work with different booth configurations and space requirements.

Print Quality:

All backdrop banners are produced using high-resolution dye-sublimation printing, ensuring professional graphics suitable for corporate presentations and trade show environments.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing & Mounting Options for Backdrop Banner Installation

Each backdrop banner includes professional finishing designed for easy setup and reliable performance at trade shows and events.

Pole Pocket Construction:

  • 4.5" Pole Pockets: Reinforced top and bottom for secure mounting
  • Professional Hemming: Double-stitched edges for durability
  • Precise Sizing: Custom cut to fit Slider frame specifications
  • Smooth Installation: Easy slide-on application

Frame Compatibility:

Our backdrop banners are specifically designed to work with the Slider telescopic frame system. The adjustable frame accommodates various display sizes while maintaining professional tension and appearance.

Setup Features:

  • Tool-Free Assembly: No additional hardware required
  • Quick Setup: Ideal for trade show time constraints
  • Portable Design: Compact storage in included carry bag
  • Multiple Configurations: Adjust width and height as needed

Professional Presentation:

The stretch fabric material and precise finishing create a smooth, professional appearance suitable for corporate environments and high-profile events.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Backdrop Banner Production & Turnaround Times

Choose from flexible production timeframes to meet your trade show and event deadlines. All backdrop banners are custom printed after artwork approval.

5 Business Days Production:

  • Cost-Effective Option: Save money when time allows
  • Quality Assurance: Full quality control and proofing process
  • Approval Process: Includes digital proof for approval
  • Production Start: Begins after artwork approval

7 Business Days Production:

  • Maximum Savings: Best price for advance planning
  • Trade Show Planning: Perfect for events planned in advance
  • Complete Process: Includes design review and quality control
  • Flexible Scheduling: Ideal for non-urgent projects

Rush Production Available:

Emergency and same-day rush options may be available for urgent trade show needs. Contact customer service for rush production availability and pricing.

Production Notes:

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Production time starts after complete file upload and approval
  • Digital proofs available upon request
  • Quality control included with all production timeframes
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Backdrop Banner Payment & Ordering Options

Secure payment processing for all custom backdrop banner orders. Payment is required before production begins to ensure timely delivery for your event.

Accepted Payment Methods:

  • Credit Cards: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover
  • Check Payments: Business and personal checks accepted
  • Purchase Orders: Available for qualified business accounts

Payment Processing:

  • Proof Approval: Payment processed after artwork approval
  • Secure Processing: Industry-standard payment security
  • Order Confirmation: Immediate confirmation upon payment
  • Production Start: Begins immediately after payment

Business Account Options:

Companies with purchase orders should contact customer service at 320-391-5300 to discuss account setup and payment terms.

Order Requirements:

  • Minimum order: $35.00 in product value
  • Check payments must be received before production
  • International orders require customer-provided shipping labels
PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Backdrop Banner Delivery

Professional shipping services ensure your backdrop banner arrives safely for your trade show or event. Multiple shipping speeds available to meet your timeline.

Shipping Speed Options:

  • Economy: 5-10 Business Days (cost-effective)
  • Standard: 3-5 Business Days (most popular)
  • Three Day: 3 Business Days (reliable)
  • Two Day: 2 Business Days (express)
  • Overnight: 1 Business Day (urgent events)
  • Freight: Available for multiple units

Shipping Coverage:

  • Ground Service: 1-3 day delivery to 90% of US
  • Professional Packaging: Secure protection for transport
  • Tracking Provided: Monitor delivery progress
  • Direct-to-Venue: Ship directly to trade show locations

Special Shipping Notes:

Backdrop banners ship in compact packaging (41" x 5" x 4") making them easy to transport to venues. The included carry bag provides additional protection and portability.

International Shipping:

International delivery available with customer-provided shipping labels. Contact customer service for international shipping coordination.

Delivery Protection:

  • Lost packages replaced after shipping company confirmation
  • Damaged goods must be returned for replacement
  • Early ordering recommended for important events
PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Trade Show & Event Uses for Backdrop Banners

Custom backdrop banners provide professional presentation solutions for various indoor events and business applications. The adjustable Slider frame system adapts to different venue requirements.

Trade Show Applications:

  • Booth Backdrops: Professional brand presentation
  • Product Displays: Highlight key products and services
  • Corporate Branding: Consistent brand messaging
  • Information Displays: Company information and contact details

Corporate Events:

  • Conferences: Speaker backdrops and stage displays
  • Company Meetings: Professional presentation backgrounds
  • Product Launches: Feature new products and services
  • Awards Ceremonies: Recognition event backdrops

Marketing Events:

  • Grand Openings: Welcome and promotional displays
  • Sales Events: Feature special offers and promotions
  • Job Fairs: Company recruitment displays
  • Community Events: Local business participation

Venue Flexibility:

The adjustable frame system allows the same banner to work in various booth sizes and room configurations, making it ideal for businesses that participate in multiple events throughout the year.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Backdrop Banner Artwork Requirements for Printing

Professional artwork preparation ensures optimal print quality for your custom backdrop banner. Follow these specifications for best results.

File Format Requirements:

  • Preferred Formats: .eps, .pdf (print-ready)
  • High-Resolution Images: .tiff or .jpg (300 dpi minimum)
  • File Size Limit: 60 MB maximum for online upload
  • Large Files: Contact customer service for files over 60 MB

Design Specifications:

  • Print Area: Account for 4.5" pole pockets top and bottom
  • Safe Zone: Keep important text/graphics away from edges
  • Resolution: 300 dpi for crisp, professional printing
  • Color Mode: CMYK for accurate color reproduction

Design Service Options:

Professional design services available if you need artwork created. Upload reference materials and provide detailed instructions for custom design work.

Template Downloads:

  • 8x8 Templates: Available in EPS and PDF formats
  • 8x10 Templates: Available in EPS and PDF formats
  • Custom Sizes: Contact customer service for other dimensions

Artwork Approval:

Digital proofs available for approval before production begins. This ensures your backdrop banner meets expectations for your trade show or event.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Backdrop Banners for Your Next Event

Create professional trade show displays with our custom backdrop replacement banners. The adjustable Slider frame system and premium stretch fabric material provide the perfect solution for corporate events, trade shows, and professional presentations.

Three Ways to Create Your Backdrop Banner:

1. Choose a Template to Customize

  • Professional templates for various industries
  • Add your logo, text, and brand colors
  • Upload additional graphics as needed
  • Easy online customization tools

2. Upload Your Print-Ready Artwork

  • Submit professional design files (.eps, .pdf preferred)
  • High-resolution images (300 dpi minimum)
  • Complete artwork specifications available
  • Quality control review before printing

3. Professional Design Services

  • Expert graphic designers create custom artwork
  • Upload reference materials and brand elements
  • Receive digital proof for approval
  • Professional design for trade show success

Why Choose Our Backdrop Banners:

  • Professional Quality: Premium materials and printing technology
  • Fast Turnaround: Flexible production times from 5-7 business days
  • Expert Support: In-house customer service and graphic designers
  • Complete Solution: Banner, frame, and carry bag included
PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Backdrop Banner Questions & Answers

What sizes are available for backdrop banners?

Our backdrop banners work with the adjustable Slider frame system, which accommodates displays from 81" to 120" width and 41.5" to 96" height. The most popular size is 96"W x 94"H for the graphic area.

How long does production take?

Choose from 5 or 7 business day production times. Rush options may be available for urgent trade show needs. Production begins after artwork approval and payment processing.

What material is used for backdrop banners?

We use premium 9 oz. stretch fabric material with dye-sublimation printing. This provides professional appearance with vibrant colors and smooth, wrinkle-resistant display.

Is the frame included with my order?

Yes, each backdrop banner includes the complete package: custom graphic, Slider frame, and black nylon carry bag. The frame features a 1-year warranty.

Can I use my own artwork?

Yes, upload print-ready files in .eps or .pdf format (300 dpi minimum). Files up to 60 MB can be uploaded online. Larger files require coordination with customer service.

How does shipping work for trade shows?

We offer multiple shipping speeds including overnight delivery. Banners ship in compact packaging (41" x 5" x 4") and can be delivered directly to trade show venues.

What if I need design help?

Our professional design services can create custom artwork for your backdrop banner. Upload reference materials and provide instructions for our graphic design team.

Is there a minimum order requirement?

Yes, there is a $35.00 minimum order requirement. Most backdrop banners exceed this minimum due to their size and included components.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
